events.title: TechSummit 2026 (Full Conference – 3-Day Pass)
events.location: Moscone Center, 747 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94103
events.description:
TechSummit 2026 – The Future of Technology.

Attendee: Alex Chen
Registration #: TS2026-78901
Pass Type: Full Conference (3-Day)

Conference dates: March 18–20, 2026
Conference daily milestones per confirmation:
- Day 1 (Wed, Mar 18): 8:00 AM Registration & Breakfast; 9:00 AM Opening Keynote; 10:00 AM–6:00 PM Sessions; 7:00 PM Welcome Reception
- Day 2 (Thu, Mar 19): 8:00 AM–6:00 PM Sessions & Workshops; 12:00 PM Networking Lunch
- Day 3 (Fri, Mar 20): 8:00 AM–3:00 PM Sessions; 3:00 PM Closing Keynote; 4:00 PM Conference ends

Badge pickup: Pick up at Registration Desk; bring photo ID.
Support: support@techsummit.com
Note: Times assumed local to San Francisco (Pacific Time).
